Other facets of my life

MataMata

I go to build a brand and storefront for something I love.

Infinite Adventures of Candide

A storytelling project for kids, turning everyday moments into small, interactive adventures led by Candide and friends.

Alahas Book

I go to make a 362-page book about Philippine heritage jewelry — and win a Good Design Award for it.

Manifesto

I go to co-found a design studio and take on brand, product, and strategy work outside of my day job.

NYC Marathon Fundraiser

I go to run a marathon and raise money for pediatric cancer research.

© 2026 Kara Bermejo
